Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. For regulation 6 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Regulations, 2010, the following shall be substituted, namely: -- “6. Miscellancous. If any question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shall be decided by the Board.” [ADVT TP4-Exty.188 144 Foot Note: Principal regulations were notified vide G.S.R. 987(E), dated 20-12-2010 and amended vide F. No. PNGRB:M (C¥62/2012, dated 13-12-2012 and F. No. PNGRB/M(C)/62/2014, dated 16-12-2014. -- 2 of 2 --
